What you'll experience

Custom Healing Session

45 minutes
$111 USD
In-person or Virtual

Amy will work with your energy to identify and dissolve blockages that are keeping you from feeling your best. Her unique technique — an evolution of Reiki that includes astral body work — is deeply intuitive and profoundly effective.

Includes
  • ✦ Full 45-minute hands-on energy healing
  • ✦ Amy's signature technique (beyond Reiki)
  • ✦ Chakra awareness and astral body work
  • ✦ Emotional and energetic release
  • ✦ Available in-person in MD or FL, or virtually
  • ✦ Post-session integration guidance

Prefer to book by phone? Call Amy directly:

610-608-9347

Energy Healing with Amy offers spiritual and energetic services only. These services are not massage therapy, bodywork, or medical care and do not diagnose or treat any physical or mental health condition.
